content.en:
"Maybe there will really be a bone transformation realm to try to cultivate this top-notch primeval technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, there may not be anyone in the ordinary Bone Transformation Realm who can really practice this top-notch primeval technique, and even if there is, it will be the future after a long time.

But once practiced, he would change from an ordinary bone transformation realm to an ancient genius in the bone transformation realm, and his strength would be terrifyingly improved.

For Ye Tian, if he practiced the top ancient technique, his strength would also skyrocket.

And relatively speaking, he himself is an ancient-level genius, and the probability of practicing the top primordial technique is higher, even if the cultivation fails, the damage to the foundation is slightly lighter.

"Ancient God Demon Spear!"

"Ancient Eternal True Body Technique!"

"Ancient Realm Technique!"

Ye Tian first selected these three top-notch primeval techniques, and if he had practiced these three top-notch primeval techniques, he would then practice other primeval techniques.

"The first to cultivate the Ancient God and Demon Spear, once it is cultivated, the attack power can definitely skyrocket several times!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Meanwhile.

The top-notch primeval technique also spread, and one of the Bone Transformation Realms regretted not snatching a few more primeval gold leaves.

The other side.

Ye Tian's three vests put the top primeval techniques obtained in their respective forces, and everyone could jointly comprehend the top primeval techniques.

In other words, Ye Tian did not lack top-notch primeval techniques.

For example, the Lord of the Ruins, the primeval gold leaf he snatched was stored in the Ruin Cave.

And his vest and water successor can comprehend these top-notch primeval techniques.

So, he didn't need to worry about the top-notch primeval arts.

And if they didn't snatch the Bone Transformation Realm of the Ancient Gold Leaf, they all wanted to obtain a top-notch Ancient Technique at this moment.

Therefore, they were all willing to spend a lot of money to buy a top-notch primeval technique, and even dreamed of practicing a top-notch primeval technique, so as to become an ancient-level genius in the bone transformation realm.

However, they are afraid that they will all be disappointed.

......

Dark Sea.

When Ye Tian saw the Lord of Darkness again, he found that the Lord of Darkness's face was pale and his injuries were not light.

"Lord of Darkness, what's wrong with you?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of Darkness said helplessly: "I have obtained a top-notch primeval technique, the primeval dark fist, and I originally wanted to practice this primeval technique to become an ancient-level genius in the bone transformation realm. The result was a failure, and the foundations were badly damaged. I knew that the defeat would be serious, but I didn't expect it to be so serious! I am now not one in ten, and I am using all kinds of precious resources to nourish the immeasurable bones and flesh, and slowly recover. Fortunately, after only one failure, it was still possible to recover after a long period of recuperation. "

"Lord of Darkness, if you are not sure, it is better not to cultivate the top primeval technique, it is not so easy to practice. Unless you obtain a large number of treasures that can quickly restore the damage of the foundation, you can only go to cultivate. Ye Tian proposed.

"I understand!" the Lord of Darkness nodded.

He is also eager for the skyrocketing strength, so he is quite risky, thinking that maybe he is lucky and can practice it at one time!

As a result, he still thinks too much!

"Endless Lord, I advise you not to cultivate the top-notch primeval technique, you are growing up very fast, don't let this affect your cultivation progress, when you cultivate to break through to the three-time bone transformation realm and the four-stage bone transformation realm, you don't need the top-notch primeval technique at all!" said the Lord of Darkness.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

However, he would not reveal himself to the Lord of Darkness.

And this situation like the Lord of Darkness is not the only one, there are other bone transformation realms that have also been severely damaged, and their foundations have been greatly damaged.

As a result, these bone transformation realms hid one by one to repair their injuries and foundations, and they would not escape for a long time.

......

Burst!

Ye Tian's copy body was cracking all over his body, but even the immeasurable bones were cracked.

Soon, the superficial wounds recovered, but the internal wounds were difficult to recover, and the foundations were damaged.

"Cultivating the Ancient God Demon Spear has failed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This failure has damaged his foundation a lot, and others are afraid that they will give up completely.

However, he didn't care, and continued to cultivate the top primeval technique of the Ancient God and Demon Spear.

After a period of time, this primeval god and demon spear failed to cultivate again.

Since Ye Tian did not recover his foundation, the damage to the foundation of this replicated body was even more serious, and the injuries were even more serious.

But he didn't care about it and continued to cultivate.

Failed again and again.

Finally, on this day, the replica body collapsed.

"One more copy of the real body, copy the body!"

Ye Tian copied another copy body and cultivated the Ancient God Demon Spear again.

That's it.

Ye Tian spent many times cultivating, but failed again and again.

"I've failed to cultivate so many times, how many times do others have to cultivate? If I have the resources to restore my foundation, I'm afraid I will have to cultivate millions or even millions of primeval eras. Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently, he continued to cultivate, spending a long time cultivating penances again and again.

Finally on this day.

Ye Tian practiced the Ancient God and Demon Spear.

However, his replica body had been severely damaged to its foundation, so even if it was cultivated, it would not be able to restore its foundation.

Thereupon.

He re-copied a replica body and cultivated the Ancient God and Demon Spear again, but unfortunately failed again.

But he succeeded once, so he grasped the mystery of the Ancient God and Demon Spear, so after cultivating a few more times, he successfully practiced the top ancient art of the Ancient God and Demon Spear.

Rumble!!!!

With the cultivation of the Ancient God Demon Spear, Ye Tian's body became even stronger, and his strength skyrocketed.

Territorial sea boundary seam, a remote area.

Ye Tian's two replica bodies competed here.

One uses the Ancient God and Demon Spear, and the other does not use the Ancient God and Demon Spear.

The two sides immediately exchanged hands.

Rumble!!!!

The Ancient God Demon Spear carried an incomparably terrifying power, directly defeating another replica body, and even piercing the defense of another replicating body, and severely damaging it with a single blow.

Within a short period of time, another replica body was killed.

"The Ancient God Demon Spear is really powerful, after I have practiced it, my current strength should be between the ordinary Fourth Bone Transformation Realm and the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm!" Ye Tian estimated.

The strength of this level is still far from the Lord of the Cave Void and the Lord of the Mixed Ruins, but if they really practice a number of top-notch primeval techniques and raise their cultivation to the Three Bone Transformation Realm, they may be closer to their level.

"Next, let's start cultivating the second top-notch Ancient Technique, just choose the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.
